subcodes.first_line: O artist! From the bounties of the Most Great Name - may my spirit be a sacrifice unto His loved ones - beseech thou that upon the canvas of contingent being thou mayest paint a design [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نقاش از الطاف اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفداء استدعاء نما که در صفحه امکان نقشی
subcodes.subjects: @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @spiritual transformation, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
